items.title: France VS England, FIFA World Cup third-place playoff Highlights: England beat France 6-4; Mbappe became top scorer in World Cup history
items.summary: Kylian Mbappe became the top scorer in World Cup history when he netted his second goal in the third-place play-off against England to take his tally to 22
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: How did England players rate during the World Cup?
items.summary: BBC Sport England reporter Alex Howell assess how the Three Lions' players fared in North America.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Captain Willey takes Northants into final with scrappy defence
items.summary: Reigning champions Somerset fall short chasing 144 as Willey inspires gutsy win
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
